chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1223 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For hearing of CMA No.5112/2023 (Fast Track) 2. For hearing of CMA No.5113/2023 (Stay/App) 3. For hearing of main case 16.11.2023 Mr. Humail Rafi Mahesar, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Niaz Hussain Maitlo, Advocate respondents-Shah Abdul Latif University, Khairpur. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for respondents-University has filed a schedule, and submits that payments to the petitioner of his retiring benefits would be paid to him in accordance with the schedule. Learned Counsel for petitioner is satisfied, and this petition is accordingly disposed of along with listed applications. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
